items.summary: Fix the chicken-and-egg authorization bug in the backend where registering the very first admin fails with 'Unauthorized: Only admins can assign user roles'. The `registerFirstAdmin` function (or equivalent initial admin setup function) must bypass the admin-only auth guard when no admins exist yet in the system. Add a condition: if the admin user count is zero, allow the registration to proceed without requiring an existing admin caller. If one or more admins already exist, the normal admin-only guard must apply.
